headlines.description: — Russell Westbrook scored 21 points and moved past Magic Johnson for seventh place on the NBA’s career assists list while leading the Sacramento Kings to a 113-107 win over the Dallas Mavericks on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Westbrook passes Magic Johnson for 7th place in career assists as Kings beat Mavericks 113-107

headlines.description: — Anthony Black scored a career-high 38 points, Desmond Bane made two free throws with 6.9 seconds left and the Orlando Magic overcame another huge triple-double by Nikola Jokic to beat the Denver Nuggets 127-126 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Black scores career-high 38, Magic overcome Jokic, Nuggets for 127-126 victory

events.name: Phoenix Suns at New Orleans Pelicans

headlines.description: — Devin Booker scored 20 points, including two clutch jumpers down the stretch, and the Phoenix Suns beat the New Orleans Pelicans 123-114 on Saturday night for a two-game sweep of their back-to-back set.
headlines.shortLinkText: Booker leads Suns past Pelicans 123-114 after Alvarado and Williams exchange punches in testy game

events.name: New York Knicks at Atlanta Hawks

headlines.description: — Karl-Anthony Towns scored a season-high 36 points with 16 rebounds, Jalen Brunson had 34 points and the New York Knicks survived Atlanta’s late comeback attempt to beat the slumping Hawks 128-125 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Karl-Anthony Towns scores 36 and Jalen Brunson adds 34 as Knicks hold off struggling Hawks 128-125

headlines.description: — Andrew Wiggins and Jaime Jaquez Jr. each scored 28 points, and the Miami Heat ran away in the fourth quarter to beat the Indiana Pacers 142-116 on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Heat run away in 4th quarter and beat Pacers 142-116 to hand Indiana its 8th straight loss

headlines.description: — Giannis Antetokounmpo scored 29 points in his return from an eight-game absence, and the Milwaukee Bucks snapped the Chicago Bulls' five-game winning streak with a 112-103 victory on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Antetokounmpo scores 29 points in his return as Bucks snap Bulls' 5-game winning streak

headlines.shortLinkText: Kevin Durant scores 30 points to lead the Rockets to a dominant win over the Cavaliers

events.name: Utah Jazz at San Antonio Spurs

headlines.description: — Lauri Markkanen had 29 points, Keyonte George added 28 points and the Utah Jazz held on to beat San Antonio 127-114 on Saturday night, snapping the Spurs' league-high eight-game winning streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Markkanen, George power Jazz to 127-114 victory, ending Spurs win streak at 8 games
